data.keyword: Where can someone get mental health case management in Louisville, KY?
data.tag: lmhg ai mode expanded Where can someone get mental health case management in Louisville, KY?

result.keyword: Where can someone get mental health case management in Louisville, KY?

items.markdown:
Mental health case management in Louisville, KY, is available through several specialized organizations and providers. These services help coordinate care, provide community support, and connect individuals with necessary resources.[[1]](https://missionconnectionhealthcare.com/mental-health/legal-rights/role-of-case-managers-in-virtual-mental-health-care/)[[2]](https://www.circlecasemanagement.com/news/article/case-manager-stress-and-anxiety)[[3]](https://www.rhscares.com/cbrs-case-management)[[4]](https://www.evergreentreatment.org/patients/services/integrated-care-management/)[[5]](https://cpcintegratedhealth.org/community-programs/)

Here are some options for mental health case management in Louisville:

- **Best Life Louisville:** Offers **Targeted Case Management** (TCM) with a focus on comprehensive and holistic care. Case managers meet regularly with clients to assess needs and collaborate with in-house therapists and nurse practitioners.
	- **Dupont Office:** 4010 Dupont Circle, Suite 130, Louisville, KY 40207.
	- **Baxter Office:** 1017 Baxter Avenue, Louisville, KY 40204.
	- **Contact:** (502) 333-9466.
- **CompServ Health Resources Inc.:** Provides therapeutic services, including psychotherapy and behavioral health services, often used in conjunction with case management.
	- **Location:** 101 N 7th St, Downtown, Louisville, KY.
	- **Contact:** (888) 751-3730.
- **Better You Behavioral Health Services:** Provides mental health services focused on issues like depression and behavioral health care.
	- **Location:** Downtown, Louisville, KY.
	- **Contact:** (502) 653-5800.
- **Strickland Cox And Associates Primary Care Center:** Offers mental health assessments and primary care services, which can include case management or referrals for complex needs.
	- **Location:** 1448 S 15th St, Park Hill, Louisville, KY.
	- **Contact:** (502) 290-3050.[](https://www.bestlifelouisville.com/case-management/) [[1]](https://www.bestlifelouisville.com/case-management/)[[2]](https://www.compservhealth.com/booking-calendar/psychotherapy-1?utm_source=google&utm_medium=book_button&utm_campaign=Psychotherapy)[[3]](https://www.zocdoc.com/practice/better-you-behavioral-health-services-146494?LocIdent=355819&utm_source=reservewithgoogle&utm_medium=seosynd&utm_campaign=hai&entity_id=pt_Wu4m1OvawUC2yowE0ILv_Q-lo_X6B0qk02o0e0XbhXgmgwQQ-entity)[[4]](https://www.tebra.com/care/practice/strickland-cox-associates-primary-care-center-208096?lid=3163400381)[[5]](https://www.bestlifelouisville.com/contact/)

For personalized mental health services, you can also contact **Jim Walker, LCSW** for therapy, located at 6006 Brownsboro Park Blvd.[[1]](https://jimwalker.fullslate.com/services/1)

If you can tell me a bit more about the **specific needs** (e.g., adult, child, insurance type), I can help you narrow down which of these providers is the best fit.
